name: Rogue Outcast 1 Hybrid
comment: Rogue Outcast 1 Hybrid is an outdoor-ready, IP65 spot/beam/wash moving head ideal for small to medium festivals and events. Powered by an intense 400W lamp, Rogue Outcast 1 Hybrid delivers a 6500K output with tight beam angles of 2deg to 14deg in Beam Mode and a zoom range of 5deg to 31deg in Spot Mode and 10deg to 25deg in Wash Mode for maximum visual impact. This feature-packed unit offers 1 rotating and 1 static gobo wheel, 2 individually controllable 8 and 5-facet layerable prisms, and a 14-hue color wheel for solid and split colors. Control is over DMX and RDM.
